name: Telegram sticker reply
description: Global sticker library (JSON), CRUD tools, Bot API sendSticker (tg_sticker_send as default plugin tool), and Telegram prompt policy.

maxCatalogLines.description: Max sticker lines in injected Telegram prompt (1–500, default 40)

migrateLegacyStickerMap.description: Merge legacy stickerMap from config into data/sticker-library.json

stickerMap.description: Legacy alias → file_id (used when migrateLegacyStickerMap is true)

allowExplicitChatId.description: Allow optional to on tg_sticker_send only when equal to current chat

botTokenOverride.description: Optional bot token for tg_sticker_send; defaults to channels.telegram

stickerPromptNudge.description: prepend_reminder (default): short per-turn prependContext so the model considers tg_sticker_send. system_only: appendSystemContext policy only.

sendStickerBodyEncoding.description: tg_sticker_send: json (default) or form (x-www-form-urlencoded, curl -d style)
